notes: Landlords must make urgent repairs within a reasonable time, typically 24 hours for emergencies.
Non-urgent repairs should be addressed within a reasonable timeframe, typically within 7 days.
Tenants should request repairs in writing and keep a copy.

citations.statute: Residential Tenancy Act, SBC 2002, c 78, s 32(1)
citations.excerpt: A landlord must provide and maintain the rental unit in a reasonable state of decoration and repair.

notes: Placeholder timelines. Verify with RTB or local tenant resources.
